body_txt: The Music Meister is a character who causes others to break out into spontaneous song and/or dance. Often used as a justification for a Musical Episode , in which case Genre Savvy characters will question (possibly in song) why they are suddenly acting like characters in a musical. To qualify as The Music Meister, a character must have an explicit power to cause others to break out in song, and the musical interludes should be commented on as being out of the ordinary . Related to Crowd Song , Enslaved Tongue , Spontaneous Choreography , and Involuntary Dance , since that's what this person causes.
